Btw tulu is a boy
Lotan got nerfed with losing +1 STR per exalt and got buffed with her skill doing more dmg
She went from strike spam to semi skill / strike

You use her for exalt nuke
When the playstyle becomes completely different

Or if everyone is low

The worst thing about draft pick is that I'll get a team I think is cool and go "Maybe I can play this in all pick" then I get over there and look for a few minutes before I realize that I didn't pull Doresain's fucking wheel and I never will
Actually, the worst thing about Draft Pick is Enthralling Chime or maybe Kaleidoscope, followed by not being able to pick everything in all pick
and that's why I always won against the minmax chasers in draft

>pick spring
>pick doresain
>pick gramona
meanwhile me picking ghelot and decimating 2 units
no wheel needed
He hit me with Gun's Cry Nobleman's Staff and then Petrify
I was afflicted with weakness for more turns than I wasn't
Unfortunately, it was GHelot with +3 Amp, having had 100 aliemus for three turns, and now Nobleman's Staff -- so no status condition would ever stick to her again

So I need another damage unit or something

Either that or be really annoying and delay their play, with stuff like stagnation units or discard their cards

To gain tempo
